description: Evaluates AbstractionAgent.step_clusters_grouping across multiple project snapshots. Grouped score is SUMMED (not averaged) to prevent overfitting to a single repo.

dimensions.name: coverage
dimensions.description: Uses production validator validate_cluster_coverage. Percentage of expected cluster IDs present in output.

dimensions.name: duplicates
dimensions.description: No cluster ID appears in more than one component. 100 if clean, -10 per duplicate.

dimensions.name: hallucinated
dimensions.description: No cluster IDs that don't exist in the expected set. 100 if clean, -10 per hallucinated ID.

dimensions.name: structural
dimensions.description: Predicts downstream validator success: no empty components, no weak descriptions, no duplicate names. -20 per issue type.

dimensions.name: grouping
dimensions.description: Low singleton ratio indicates meaningful grouping. 100 - singleton_ratio * 100.

scoring.composite_formula: weighted_average per project, then SUMMED across projects

downstream_validators_predicted: validate_group_name_coverage — checked via duplicate_names and empty_components
validate_qualified_names — not applicable to step 1 (no key_entities yet)
